module.exports = (file, api) => { const jscodeshift = api.jscodeshift const root = jscodeshift(file.source) const replacements = [ { from: 'react-query', to: '@tanstack/react-query' }, { from: 'react-query/devtools', to: '@tanstack/react-query-devtools' }, ] replacements.forEach(({ from, to }) => { root .find(jscodeshift.ImportDeclaration, { source: { value: from, }, }) .replaceWith(({ node }) => { node.source.value = to return node }) }) return root.toSource({ quote: 'single', lineTerminator: '\n' }) }
